GROWTH VIA CUSTOMER SUCCESS AND RETENTION

Managing the complex intersection of growing companies and customer experience--orchestrating strategy, structure, people, process, and technology to drive customer success, retention, loyalty, and profitability


Growth and development specialist with a 20-year track record delivering successful client engagements resulting in sustained revenue growth and customer retention; owning end-to-end business development, client delivery, and account management; coaching independent and boutique consultancies to win in online marketplaces. Expert in spearheading corporate initiatives and leading cross-functional teams to measurable customer impact. Results include:


  • Evolved onboarding and customer experience for 80,000+ member independent consulting marketplace
  • Transforming service delivery for the world's largest industry marketplace with 40K+ SaaS-style customers; increasing contribution margin via $1M first-year cost savings and $2M in additional retained revenue.
  • Founding and growing two professional services firms and leading a 3rd to 100% growth in 4 of 5 years; creating the vision and structure for all client-facing elements of sales, service, and success. 
  • Managing IT, change management, and human capital professional services for a Big 4 consulting firm; owning relationships to ensure client referenceability and rising engagement margins. 


PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE


Infinipoint, Washington, DC 2013 - Current

Founder and Principal

Collaborate with B2B clients to grow customer retention and revenue at improved margins. Select recent engagements:

  • Global B2B2C marketplace: reorganized multiple divisions to streamline and improve customer and revenue retention. Aligned strategy, structure, human capital and processes to deliver on each customer outcome--support, retention, and/or growth. Achieved strongest retention numbers in 10 year history and improved cost of retention.
  • Global B2B real estate software SaaS leader: conducted primary research, facilitated executive leadership team sessions, and produced recommendations for a global client success function. 
  • Travel management company: reframed the sales and success functions toward outcome-based metrics and incentivized both customers and team members for achieving higher early usage benchmarks. Results include improved revenue capture and customer retention.
  • Top market research marketplace: facilitated foresight-based strategic planning sessions to anticipate the challenges and opportunities in a post-COVID world. The executives defined high-probability + high-impact initiatives to increase their value in the market and meet the emerging needs of customers and consumers. 


Catalant Technologies, Boston, MA 2021 - 2023

Head of Expert Experience

Led a new expert-centric focus on the Catalant platform to drive expert success, satisfaction, and retention.

  • Implemented multi-channel voice-of-customer feedback system that led to more than twenty platform improvements resulting in greater transparency, trust, and performance.
  • Piloted and tested multiple direct value-added programs and services to transform Catalant into an essential partner for independent consultants, resulting in a foundation for future expansion and potential monetization
  • Launched verification and onboarding process to manually validate 1000+ newly signed up consultants per month and prepare them for success on the platform, resulting in a more relevant talent pool and higher early win rates.  


The Knot Worldwide (formerly WeddingWire), Chevy Chase, MD 2013 - 2019

VP, Customer Experience and VP, Operations

Drove corporate cultural transition for Operations and Customer Experience from cost-centers to value-drivers; streamlining processes and using data analytics to proactively inform sales behavior, and re-organizing CX teams and roles to maximize customer retention and margin.  


PricewaterhouseCoopers Federal Advisory Practice (now Guidehouse)\t2012 - 2013

Manager

Led large-scale business development, and engagement delivery and economics for Department of Homeland Security and Department of Justice clients focused on strategy, management, and IT consulting. 


Hassett Willis & Company (now HWC) \t2006 - 2012

Managing Director and Engagement Manager

Instrumental in growing the firm from 3 to 35 employees in 5 years. Created practice management processes for all aspects of business development, client delivery, re-compete strategies, and account management. 


U.S. General Services Administration (GSA)\t2004 - 2006

Deputy Program Director, Enterprise CRM and CRM Practice Manager


Siebel Systems (now Oracle, Inc.)\t2000 - 2004

Principal Consultant
